manifest.title: Markdown Leaf Example
manifest.description: A hand-written fixture proving the markdown content leaf (E1-S1): a root container holds a body region whose grid places a block-wrapped markdown leaf. The leaf's opaque `source` carries a ${region} template that interpolates from the doc-scope variable before validation, demonstrating that a new content-leaf type auto-discovers, fits the grammar as a block-wrapped leaf, and gains interpolation for free. Conforms to https://lattice.dev/schemas/dashboard/1.0.0.
